prose: Fukui reactivity indices for acrolein computed at DFT B3LYP/def2-TZVP (PySCF RKS), tier 'standard', gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. No density fitting (exact four-centre integrals). Partial charges via Mulliken (PySCF). N±1 states: cation (charge +1, mult 2), anion (charge −1, mult 2). Geometry from user-supplied .xyz, not re-optimized. All integrity checks passed (trustworthy=true, status=ok). Sum(f+)=1.0000, sum(f-)=1.0000. No engine warnings. Headline value reported is the maximum f+ (electrophilic Fukui index), located on atom 4 (C, the β-carbon): f+=0.64232102. Most nucleophilic site: atom 1 (O), f-=0.39388616. Dual descriptor maximum: atom 4, Δf=0.55495. Results fully consistent with acrolein's known 1,4-Michael-acceptor reactivity.
